# Ecd

**Summary**: The effective density of the drilling fluid in the annulus while circulating.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2019-elzenary|Elzenary, 2019]] used ECD as a key parameter for hole cleaning estimation.

## Scientific Context

- [[2019-elzenary|Elzenary, 2019]] Critical for managing well pressure and ensuring hole cleaning.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2019-elzenary|Elzenary, 2019]] Predicted via AI models from surface data.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The ANN and ANFIS models both predicted ECD with high accuracy (R > 0.99). ([[2019-elzenary|Elzenary, 2019, p. 67]])
